title: An Evangelion Hotel Room JOY
wikitext:
[]: An Evangelion Hotel Room!!! JOY!!!!             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sun Jan 30, 2011 1:24 am Honestly i have no idea what they were thinking when they did this. But man those Japanese otaku would appear to buy into anything these days. But at $450 US a night? No thanks... Source: Anime News Network The hotel room will feature an entry plug-shaped bed where guests can watch DVDs while lying on their backs. Guests can also wake up to a morning call exclusively recorded with the character Rei Ayanami's voice, and an interactive "voice touch panel" and telephone will emit comments in Rei's voice. Lines of dialogue and graphics will appear on the walls with the use of black light lamps, and there will be a statue of Rei as well as replicas of original Evangelion artwork and other features. [url]http://io9.com/5746415/stay-in-a-neon+genesis-evangelion-hotel-room-for-450-night[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 30, 2011 3:20 am They should have made it a replica of Rei's concrete hovel, not this brightly-lit one-room themepark. The chance to sleep on a rumpled cot next to a pile of (fake) bloody bandages in an atmosphere of dimmly lit gloom and piped in constant mechanical thumping background noise would probably be FAR more effective in attracting otaku customers. Having to constantly refill the dresser with bland undergarments to make up for stolen or otherwise fouled items would be a negligible cost in comparison.

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Sun Jan 30, 2011 4:59 am NemZ wrote: Having to constantly refill the dresser with bland undergarments to make up for stolen or otherwise fouled items

[]: Is the room supplied with a Rei dakimakura?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun Jan 30, 2011 12:05 pm Why can't my bedroom look like that? Then I'd get all the chicks.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jan 30, 2011 12:58 pm so is the Rei doll fuckable or not? I think this is pretty important.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Jan 30, 2011 1:05 pm What part of Evangelion is this hotel room intended to represent, exactly Don't say "your wallet" or I'm gonna bop you

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Jan 30, 2011 1:05 pm Xard wrote: so is the Rei doll fuckable or not? I think this is pretty important.

[]:             Quote Post by Crystal Wolf » Sun Jan 30, 2011 1:13 pm :allears:

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun Jan 30, 2011 2:18 pm And boom goes Anno's soul...again.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sun Jan 30, 2011 3:19 pm He'll be fine, I'm pretty sure he's used to it now. He'll pick up the pieces while walking all the way to the bank.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jan 30, 2011 3:35 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: I dunno, but with so many people staying in the same room, I´d rather not try to go touch the Rei doll. Or even go near it, let alone licking Rei from head to armpits to breasts to belly to hips to toes while humming Fly me to the Moon with a Rei figurine stuck up your anus experiencing the most warm and content orgasm in the history of the First Ancestral Race.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Jan 30, 2011 3:51 pm Xard wrote: I guess it's inside glass for a reason

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sun Jan 30, 2011 4:34 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: I dunno, but with so many people staying in the same room, I´d rather not try to go touch the Rei doll. Or even go near it, let alone licking Rei from head to armpits to breasts to belly to hips to toes while humming Fly me to the Moon with a Rei figurine stuck up your anus experiencing the most warm and content orgasm in the history of the First Ancestral Race.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Jan 30, 2011 6:14 pm I can't see it accomodating one and ones' harem, but I suppose comprimises* could be made**. * Share the Entry Plug bed ** Sexy Pillow Fight

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Mon Jan 31, 2011 2:23 pm Xard wrote: so is the Rei doll fuckable or not? I think this is pretty important.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jan 31, 2011 4:56 pm Xard wrote: I'm pretty sure is Anno just proud of himself, having created something that can be used to market hotel rooms... :3

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 31, 2011 5:08 pm Extra points if you can think of a name for it. BTW, just an after thought, but thats exactly what Rei's room looked like. Wonder if she was running a side business out of there.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Jan 31, 2011 5:28 pm Needs more Asuka. Hell, just make another room in red for Asuka fans. Might as well go for broke.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jan 31, 2011 6:34 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Extra points if you can think of a name for it. BTW, just an after thought, but thats exactly what Rei's room looked like. Wonder if she was running a side business out of there.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Jan 31, 2011 9:57 pm Bagheera wrote: Needs more Asuka. Hell, just make another room in red for Asuka fans. Might as well go for broke.
